units.originalDescription: Premium Trim & Tilt Hydraulic Rebuild Service This is not a unit for sale.This listing is for a professional rebuild service for your existing hydraulic unit. For over a decade, Five Star Marine has rebuilt 40,000+ hydraulic units including: Trim & Tilt Systems Steering Cylinders Hydraulic Helms Pumps Custom High-Performance Systems Military Applications We are known worldwide for precision craftsmanship, unmatched experience, and uncompromising quality in marine hydraulics. How the Rebuild Process Works Step 1 — Purchase the Service The price listed on this page is a deposit toward the rebuild service. Hard parts are not included in the base rebuild price. Step 4 — Rebuild & Payment Typical turnaround time: 4–6 business days after we receive the unit Once complete, our office will: Call or email you Collect final payment Ship the rebuilt unit back Turnaround Time Normal turnaround: 4–6 business days During peak boating season: Up to 2 weeks Factors that may extend rebuild time include: Seasonal demand Parts availability Hurricane disruptions Sand blasting / coating services Problematic units requiring additional testing We do not rush rebuilds.Every unit must pass full testing before shipping. units.originalDescription: More information on Rebuild Service process below: Life Expectancy – Your standard trim unit is only designed to last 10-15 Years after that the manufactures are hoping to sell you a new unit if not sell you the same junky seals they used the first time that failed. A properly Rebuilt unit from Five Star Marine should last 20-30 Years depending on your environment in which you run the boat. We Are The Best In The Business For Trim Units – We have been specialized in this field for years and have made a great name for ourselves in the marine community from California to New York, Jamaica to Alaska, Hawaii to Norway we’ve helped boaters from all over the globe. Quality Seals – We use our own seals manufactured to our specific specifications instead of the OEM, the manufactures are great but they aren’t stupid and they have shareholders to please and planned obsolescence is in full effect when it comes to trim units. We have manufactured seals with better sealing properties and much better Oxidation, UV, Fuel & Chemical resistance. Materials like Viton and High Grade Urethanes, these materials can cost up to 15 times more than standard OEM seals but is a drop in the bucket compared to the overall cost of these units. We do not cut corners and we are proud to break the vicious cycle by taking the customers side and not short sided profit. Special Cleaning Process – All Units are broken down to the bare bones and cleaned thoroughly inside and out. We have special High Pressure Hot Tank Washing Machines that aid in this process as well as Ultrasonic Cleaners for valve assemblies etc. After Years of use these units build up debris internally that can clog valves, create leak down issues etc. 3 Stage Buffing Process- A seal is only as good as the surface it rides on, too often we see sandpaper scratches on the thin chrome plating of these rams. Even surface pitting can be buffed out and smoothed but we have a more subtle approach that makes for a mirror finish but can only

units.model: Suzuki Fluid Pin Kit Upgrade 48125-93J00 48121-93J13 48500-98J03 FSM139
units.originalDescription: We have ran into these pins completely corroding and leaking especially on boats that are kept in the water. This was a Mercury design and was adopted by Yamaha and Suzuki for their large HP applications overall its a good design except for the corrosion / Electrolysis issue surrounding this design. Upgrades For Our Kit include- Extruded Aircraft Grade Aluminum with Type 3 Hard Anodization (Military Grade Anodization) Viton o-Rings to prevent oxidation and help withstand the salt water environment. Teflon Back Up Rings to prevent extrusion under High Pressure Loads. A ground location to help prevent corrosion from isolation. The OEM parts were not up to our standards when we rebuild them in house the OEM parts were dissolving and creating issues for us this made us come up with advanced solutions for age old problems.

units.model: Yamaha Fluid Pin Kit Upgrade 6AW-4381A-01-00 6AW-4389H-00-006 AW-43871-00-00 FSM126
units.originalDescription: This is a Special Fluid Pin Upgrade Kit For All Yamaha V8 Trim Tilt Units We have ran into these pins completely corroding and leaking especially on boats that are kept in the water. This was a Mercury design and was adopted by Yamaha and Suzuki for their large HP applications overall its a good design except for the corrosion / Electrolysis issue surrounding this design. Upgrades For Our Kit include- Extruded Aircraft Grade Aluminum with Type 3 Hard Anodization (Military Grade Anodization) Viton o-Rings to prevent oxidation and help withstand the salt water environment. Teflon Back Up Rings to prevent extrusion under High Pressure Loads. A ground location to help prevent corrosion from isolation. The OEM parts were not up to our standards when we rebuild them in house the OEM parts were dissolving and creating issues for us this made us come up with advanced solutions for age old problems.

units.originalDescription: This kit will rebuild the Mercury / Flex Steering Cylinder this ram is better than the Seastar and utilizes a larger ram as well as a metal plunger internally also the casting is much heavier and the wear surfaces are larger for less play and more stability We are offering this kit as a Upgrade over the OEM as we use Viton seals for this application and when rebuilt properly this will ensure a working life of about 30 years. We only use the best quality materials when producing aftermarket parts and we strive to be the best in the industry for Marine Hydraulics. This kit will rebuild Cylinders with P/N: 898349A14 898349A11 898349A04 898349A15 UC128-SVS 2P UC128-OBF/2 We used all Viton seals for this kit as Viton is a super material and costs 15 times more than other NBR or Urethane materials and last 2-3 times as long, Viton was Formulated by Dupont it is a Synthetic Rubber which resists Oxidation, UV Rays, Solvents, Acids and ozone on paper the working life of this material is about 30 years and I would suspect it will last even longer than that. We have gone great lengths to bring better quality parts to the marine industry as we have seen these systems leak within 5 years of being new. Low Quality Urethane Seals Deteriorate Rapidly In The Marine Environment You won’t find better seals on the market hands down. These caps never wear out and they can be resealed without any issues. units.originalDescription: This kit replaces your old mounting pins and bushing for the Showa style or 64E style trim system, they often have issues with age and wear and tear and we redesigned a few things to provide a tighter and more reliable mounting system to help with trailering and ruining offshore as the bushings are made from a Ballistic plastic and holds a much tighter tolerance than the OEM. We also used all 316 Stainless so you will not have corrosion issues like we very often see on the lower pins. Also we used a longer and better quality retaining mounting bolt for lower pin as the OEM tends to strip out from the force of the engine moving side to side. We make all of our products to the highest quality dimensions and materials. This kit is especially helpful to bass boat owners who trailer very far and end up having excessive play in the trim system causing more throw and damage long term.

units.model: Outboard Prop Shaft Seal Tool Yamaha Mercury Suzuki Tohatsu Honda Evinrude BRP FSM070
units.originalDescription: This was one of my favorite special tools and for pulling prop shaft seals it can’t get any easier with this tool. It will fit Yamaha Mercury Evinrude Johnson Suzuki motors from various HPs from 40HP-400HP all of the seal drivers may not fit perfect but the seal pullers is what really matters in this kit because pulling a prop shaft seal without damaging the housing and the shaft is the key to making a good seal. These will also work on pulling other seals as well. Always keep in mind a seal is only as good as the surface is rides on so removing the old seals without gouging the surfaces is a must. A trick to cleaning up the shafts is using a socket adapter on a drill and spinning it while you run very fine emery on the shaft this will debur it and give you a fresh surface also pressing the seals in at a different depth is also very helpful if your shafts have wear grooves in them from hard seals. I originally purchased this kit years and years ago from a OMC dealer going out of business and I always found this to be extremely helpful. They stopped producing this kit probably because it worked too well. The original kit wouldn’t work on new style lower units V6 Yamaha Evinrude Mercury etc because the propshaft was too big so I redesigned a new puller head to accommodate newer engines with larger shafts. the spiral pullers are made from Hardened Steel for long term use and durability and this tool kit will pay for itself after 2 jobs and should last a lifetime as long as it doesn’t go overboard. This kit is for professionals only (Shops, Dealers, Independents, Mobile Guys) All Sales Final If you have any questions or concerns please contact us at (727) 346 – 6912

This tolerance issue can cause units to leak down, get stuck, and even snap off from. This is a emergency function that is critical and should not be overlooked and very often these relief valve sheer off and fall apart when you try to use them, potentially leaving you stuck. Also the tips of the Plastic version break off inside the unit and create a huge issue without the proper tools extracting the piece can be damaging to the unit. Also we receive dozens of units every year with this valve drilled out leaving the entire unit useless, the machined internal seal surfaces must be perfect or you will acquire leak down issues etc. Lastly be careful what you buy in todays world many Chinese companies are selling knock off parts and it wouldn’t be so bad if they actually made them properly and of the correct material and tested them, but they only care about flooding the market with cheap junk. units.model: Yamaha Outboard Motor Fuel Injector Basket Filter HPDI – Mystery Filter Set of 8 FSM017
units.originalDescription: This is a set of 8 micro basket filters which are found in Yamaha part number 68F139101000 fuel injectors. They fit Yamaha outboard motors 2000 and up HPDI LZ, Z 150hp 175hp and 200hp and should also fit VZ models. These are the correct 14mm filter that come in the stock injectors and in the HP pumps. The amount of filters you will need varies on your model and number of injectors. Professional instillation recommended, this system runs at very high fuel pressures any leaks could cause a fire or even an explosion. Free Information————————– High Pressure Pump Filters are located in the head of the pumps it is relatively easy to replace them but it is high recommended red lock tight is used on the bolts when reassembling. Be sure to also change your pumps gear oil every 100 hours or so this will insure your pump lives a long life, standard Lower unit/gear lube is what is called for in that application. Baskets Can be removed with a basic screw attached to a vise grip simply screw it in and pull it out, be careful not to damage the seat surface, many times the plastic basket will come out without the brass ring attached simply go in again and remove the seat ring. Install new baskets by simply pressing them in, not much force is required. 150-200 use a single headed pump, 250-300 use a double headed pump. It is crucial especially with todays fuels that these filters be replaced all too often lean conditions are created from this very restriction especially on a twin headed pump. If you have any questions or concerns please contact us at (727) 346 – 6912

units.originalDescription: * All sales are final * Please be sure of your application before ordering as we do not offer refunds. This is the Highest Quality Rebuild kit on the market by far built by the specialist who rebuilds these units daily. This kit uses materials like Viton and High Grade Urethane Seals to ensure you will only have to rebuild your unit once for the life of the motor. Why do we use Viton for the wiper on this unit? Because it is Resistant to Ethanol, UVs, Oxidation and has amazing properties for longevity it was formulated by Dupont and costs on average 15 times more than the standard NBR Or Nitrile OEM seals. The wiper is the first layer of defense and truly the most important to keep the bad stuff out and the good stuff in. Build your unit once and for all with peace of mind just like the professionals. Volvo Penta Round Capped Hydraulic Trim Cylinder Rebuild Kit.
